trophies.name: UEFA Champions League
trophies.description: The most prestigious club competition in European football. Real Madrid are the most decorated club in the tournament's history.

trophies.name: La Liga
trophies.description: Spain's top-flight football division. Real Madrid hold the record for the most La Liga titles ever won.

trophies.name: Copa del Rey
trophies.description: Spain's primary knockout cup competition. Real Madrid are the joint record holders along with Barcelona.

trophies.name: FIFA Club World Cup
trophies.description: The premier international club competition. Real Madrid have dominated the tournament since its modern inception.

trophies.name: UEFA Super Cup
trophies.description: Contested between the Champions League and Europa League winners each season.

trophies.name: Supercopa de España
trophies.description: The Spanish Super Cup, traditionally contested between La Liga and Copa del Rey winners.
